# BrikOps Safety — Design System Reference

**Generated by:** `ui-ux-pro-max` skill (v2) with targeted queries on product / style / color / typography / chart / ux domains.
**Scope:** Single source of truth for Safety module UI. Referenced by Part 1-5 implementation specs.
**Last updated:** 2026-04-22

---

## 1. Core Pattern & Style (CONFIRMED by skill)

### Layout Pattern
**"Real-Time / Operations Landing"** — for ops/security/IoT products.
- Hero with product + live preview/status
- Key metrics/indicators row
- Status colors (green / amber / red) as primary semantic
- Data-dense but scannable

### Style Composition (hybrid — two styles for different zones)

| Zone | Style | Why |
|------|-------|-----|
| **Hero / Top of Safety Home** | Executive Dashboard | Large KPIs (4-6 max), big Safety Score, trend sparklines, traffic-light indicators, at-a-glance |
| **Below fold / internal tabs** | Data-Dense Dashboard | Compact cards (8-12px padding), tables with sorting, filter state, maximum info density |
| **Settings / forms / create flows** | Minimalism + Trust & Authority | Compliance context demands conservative trust signals |

### Anti-patterns (explicit AVOID list)
- Ornate design (decorative gradients beyond status meaning)
- No filtering (every list MUST have the shared SafetyFilterSheet)
- Emoji as icons (Lucide SVG only — stroke width 1.5 or 2)
- Tiny tap targets (<44×44pt)
- Placeholder-only inputs (always visible `<label>`)
- Submit-only validation (inline onBlur per field)
- Auto-play any media (accessibility + bandwidth)

---

## 2. Color Tokens (CONFIRMED — Construction/Architecture palette from colors.csv)

```css
/* SEMANTIC TOKENS — import once, never hardcode hex in components */
--color-primary: #64748B;          /* slate-500 — industrial grey */
--color-on-primary: #FFFFFF;
--color-secondary: #94A3B8;        /* slate-400 */
--color-accent: #EA580C;           /* orange-600 — safety orange, WCAG 3:1 adjusted from F97316 */
--color-on-accent: #FFFFFF;
--color-background: #F8FAFC;       /* slate-50 */
--color-foreground: #334155;       /* slate-700 */
--color-card: #FFFFFF;
--color-card-foreground: #334155;
--color-muted: #EBF0F5;
--color-muted-foreground: #64748B;
--color-border: #E2E8F0;           /* slate-200 */
--color-destructive: #DC2626;      /* red-600 — severity-3, regulatory alerts */
--color-on-destructive: #FFFFFF;
--color-ring: #64748B;

/* STATUS RAMP — used by severity pills, Safety Score gauge, training expiry chips */
--status-green: #22C55E;           /* passing / up-to-date */
--status-amber: #F59E0B;           /* warning / expiring <30d / severity 2 */
--status-red: #EF4444;             /* critical / expired / severity 3 */

/* GAUGE BANDS — Safety Score 0-100 */
--gauge-red: #EF4444;              /* 0-49   — כישלון */
--gauge-amber: #F59E0B;            /* 50-79  — דרוש שיפור */
--gauge-green: #22C55E;            /* 80-100 — תקין */
```

**Notes from skill:**
- Safety orange (`#EA580C`) was **adjusted from `#F97316` specifically for WCAG 3:1 contrast** on white. Do NOT use `#F97316` / `orange-500` in the safety module.
- Never use color alone to convey severity — always pair with icon + text label (accessibility §1: `color-not-only`).
- Dark mode: use desaturated / lighter tonal variants, don't invert.

---

## 3. Typography

### Fonts
- **Primary (keep):** Heebo — already used across BrikOps. Weights 400 / 500 / 600 / 700.
- **Fallback:** `'Heebo', 'Noto Sans Hebrew', system-ui, sans-serif`
- **Rationale:** Skill recommends Noto Sans Hebrew as the canonical Hebrew pairing. We keep Heebo for brand consistency (already loaded); Noto Sans Hebrew is the documented fallback for regulatory PDFs where Heebo isn't available.

### Tabular numerals (CRITICAL for data columns)
All numeric columns (dates, IDs, prices, percentages, durations) must use:
```css
font-feature-settings: 'tnum' 1;
font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
```
Heebo supports `tnum`. This prevents layout shift when numbers update (Safety Score, task counters, expiry dates).

### Type scale (4pt rhythm)
```
display:   48px / 1.1  / 700   — Safety Score big number (KPI hero)
h1:        32px / 1.2  / 700   — page title
h2:        24px / 1.25 / 600   — section header
h3:        18px / 1.3  / 600   — card title
body-lg:   16px / 1.5  / 400   — primary body, form inputs (mobile min)
body:      14px / 1.5  / 400   — secondary body
label:     12px / 1.4  / 500   — badges, chips, meta
micro:     10px / 1.2  / 500   — timestamps, disclaimers (use sparingly)
```

---

## 4. Spacing & Layout (4/8pt system — Material-aligned)

```css
--space-1: 4px;    --space-2: 8px;    --space-3: 12px;
--space-4: 16px;   --space-5: 20px;   --space-6: 24px;
--space-8: 32px;   --space-10: 40px;  --space-12: 48px;

--grid-gap: 8px;
--card-padding-compact: 12px;   /* Data-Dense zone */
--card-padding-comfortable: 16px; /* Executive zone, forms */
--card-radius: 12px;
--card-radius-lg: 16px;          /* hero cards, modals */
--table-row-height: 36px;        /* compact mode */
--table-row-height-comfortable: 48px; /* touch mode on mobile */
--header-height: 56px;
--bottom-nav-height: 64px;
--safe-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 0);
```

**Touch rules (enforced):**
- Min tap target 44×44pt (iOS) / 48×48dp (Android) — `min-h-[44px] min-w-[44px]`
- Min 8px gap between adjacent tap targets
- Extend hit area with `hitSlop` when icon is visually smaller
- Fixed elements reserve `env(safe-area-inset-bottom)` so content isn't occluded

---

## 5. Safety Score Gauge — Full spec

**Chart type:** Custom SVG Gauge (inline, zero bundle cost).
**Why SVG over library:** chart is static per page load (cached 5min server-side), no animation beyond initial mount, no legend. D3/ApexCharts would add 40-150KB for a single widget.

### Visual structure
```
┌─────────────────────────────────┐
│        [SVG 180° arc]           │
│          ┏━━━━━━━┓               │
│        /           \             │
│       /    ┌────┐   \           │   ← Red (0-49) / Amber (50-79) / Green (80-100) bands
│      │     │ 87 │    │           │
│       \    └────┘   /           │   ← Big number, tabular-nums, 48px/700
│        \           /             │
│          ━━━━━━━━                │
│       תקין · 87/100              │   ← Status label + "%/target" TEXT beside gauge
│       ↑ +3 מהשבוע שעבר           │   ← Trend arrow + delta (meets `color-not-only`)
└─────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Accessibility requirements (AA — skill enforced)
- **Numerical value + target MUST be visible as text** next to gauge, not only as position on arc. Never rely on color/position alone.
- `role="meter"`, `aria-valuenow="87"`, `aria-valuemin="0"`, `aria-valuemax="100"`, `aria-valuetext="87 מתוך 100, תקין"`
- `aria-live="polite"` on the parent if value updates in-session
- Trend arrow: paired with "+3" text delta + `aria-label="עלה ב-3 נקודות מול השבוע שעבר"`
- Reduced-motion: skip the count-up animation, render final value directly

### Formula (from spec PART 2 §A4)
```
Safety Score = 40 × training_compliance_ratio
             + 25 × task_on_time_ratio
             + 20 × inspections_pass_ratio
             + 15 × (1 - open_sev2_sev3_ratio)
```
All sub-scores 0-1. Cached 5min in Redis. Expose breakdown on tap: bottom sheet showing each component with mini bullet chart.

---

## 6. KPI Cards — 6-card grid

Executive Dashboard style. Each card:

```
┌──────────────────────────────┐
│ [icon·2×2]        סטטוס•icon │  ← corner chip: 🟢🟡🔴
│                              │
│          127                 │  ← 48px/700 tabular-nums
│    תיעודים פעילים            │  ← 14px/500 label
│                              │
│    ╱╲    ╱╲                  │  ← 7-day sparkline (24px tall)
│   ╱  ╲  ╱  ╲   ↑ +12         │  ← trend arrow + delta text
└──────────────────────────────┘
```

**6 cards:**
1. תיעודים פעילים (open documentations)
2. משימות פתוחות (open tasks) — split: `סה״כ · בפיגור`
3. כוח אדם באתר (workers on site today)
4. הדרכות תקפות (trainings valid / total)
5. בקרות תקופתיות (periodic inspections this month)
6. אירועי בטיחות (incidents this month)

### Rules
- Max 6 cards — Executive Dashboard rule
- Each card has ONE primary metric + ONE trend sparkline + ONE status chip
- Grid: `grid-cols-2` on mobile (3 rows), `grid-cols-3` on tablet (2 rows), `grid-cols-6` on desktop (1 row)
- Min card width 140px mobile, 240px desktop
- Tap on card → drills to filtered list (deep-linked URL)

---

## 7. Internal tabs — Data-Dense Dashboard style

Three tabs below the KPI hero:
```
[ תיעוד ] [ משימות ] [ כוח אדם ]    ← sticky, active state: orange underline 2px
[ Filter ] [ Sort ]    [חיפוש...] ← compact toolbar 48px, right-aligned RTL
```

### Tab bar (navigation)
- `role="tablist"`, each tab `role="tab"`, `aria-selected="true"` on active
- Active state: `border-b-2 border-[--color-accent] text-[--color-foreground] font-semibold`
- Inactive: `text-[--color-muted-foreground]`
- Badge support: e.g. `משימות 12` with red badge if overdue exists — per skill `tab-badge` rule

### List/card rendering (mobile-first)
- Documentation / Tasks: rich cards (status + severity + photos + assignee avatars + reporter avatar + dates + attached PDF chips)
- Workforce: compact table on desktop, expandable cards on mobile
- Virtualize when list ≥50 items (skill rule `virtualize-lists`)
- `loading="lazy"` on photo thumbnails

### Empty states (REQUIRED per tab)
| Tab | Message | Primary CTA | Secondary CTA |
|-----|---------|-------------|---------------|
| תיעוד | "אין תיעוד עדיין לפרויקט" | "תעד ממצא ראשון" | "ייבא מ-CSV" |
| משימות | "אין משימות פתוחות — כל הכבוד!" | "צור משימה חדשה" | — |
| כוח אדם | "אין עובדים רשומים" | "הוסף עובד ראשון" | "ייבא מ-CSV" |

Skip blank screens. `empty-state` severity Medium in skill — treated as required.

---

## 8. Filter Sheet — 7-dimension bottom sheet

```
┌────────────────────────────┐
│  ×            סנן          │  ← header with close
├────────────────────────────┤
│ חברה          [ כל החברות ▾]│
│ מקצוע         [ 3 נבחרו ▾ ] │
│ קטגוריה       [ 10 נבחרו ▾]│
│ סטטוס         [chips multi]│
│ חומרה         [1] [2] [3]  │
│ טווח תאריכים  [מ..] [עד..] │
│ דגלים         [☐ פתוח >7י]│
│               [☐ בפיגור] │
├────────────────────────────┤
│   [נקה]        [החל סינון] │  ← sticky footer
└────────────────────────────┘
```

- Bottom sheet pattern (same as existing BottomSheetModal in ProjectControlPage.js)
- `modal-escape` rule: clear close affordance + swipe-down to dismiss
- `sheet-dismiss-confirm` rule: if user made changes and taps ×, confirm before dismissing
- URL state sync via `useSearchParams` — shareable filtered views
- Applied filters show as compact chips above the list: `חברה: אלקטרה · חומרה: 2,3 · נמצאו 47`

---

## 9. Motion & Animation

**Duration tokens:**
- Micro-interaction: 150ms (tap feedback, state toggle)
- Standard transition: 250ms (sheet enter, tab change)
- Complex: 400ms max (page transition)
- Exit: ~60-70% of enter duration (`exit-faster-than-enter` rule)

**Easing:**
- Enter: `cubic-bezier(0.0, 0.0, 0.2, 1)` (ease-out)
- Exit: `cubic-bezier(0.4, 0.0, 1, 1)` (ease-in)
- Prefer spring physics for card press (scale 0.95-1.05)

**Rules:**
- `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` → disable all non-essential animation (`motion-meaning` rule)
- Only animate `transform` / `opacity` — never `width`/`height`/`top`/`left`
- Sheets enter from bottom, exit to bottom (`hierarchy-motion` rule)
- Stagger list item entrance by 30-50ms per item, max 8 items staggered

---

## 10. Bulk actions (Workforce tab)

Per skill `bulk-actions` UX rule (severity Low, but high-value for 50+ worker lists).

```
[☑] 3 עובדים נבחרו                    [ביטול]
┌──────────────────────────────────────┐
│ [ הקצה הדרכה ]  [ ייצא נבחרים ]      │
│ [ מחק עם Undo ]  [ ביטול בחירה ]     │
└──────────────────────────────────────┘
```
- Checkbox column appears on long-press (mobile) or hover (desktop)
- Action bar slides up from above bottom nav
- Destructive action (mחק) requires confirmation dialog + `undo-support` rule: 5-second Undo toast

---

## 11. Implementation checklist (use per screen before merge)

### Visual quality
- [ ] No emojis used as icons (Lucide SVG only, stroke 1.5-2, single icon family)
- [ ] All colors reference `--color-*` tokens, no raw hex in components
- [ ] Status always paired with icon + text (not color alone)
- [ ] Pressed states don't shift layout bounds (scale only)

### Interaction
- [ ] All tappable elements ≥44×44pt
- [ ] 8px+ gap between adjacent tap targets
- [ ] Pressed feedback within 100ms (scale + opacity)
- [ ] Disabled states: `opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed pointer-events-none`

### Light/Dark mode (dark is Phase 2 but prepare tokens now)
- [ ] Primary text ≥4.5:1 contrast in light mode
- [ ] Tested with `prefers-color-scheme: dark` (graceful fallback — Phase 2 full support)

### Layout
- [ ] Safe-area insets respected (top status bar, bottom nav, iOS gesture area)
- [ ] Tested at 375px / 768px / 1024px / 1440px
- [ ] No horizontal scroll on mobile
- [ ] RTL tested explicitly (`dir="rtl"` root, logical properties preferred)

### Accessibility
- [ ] All icon-only buttons have `aria-label`
- [ ] All form inputs have associated `<label for>`
- [ ] Form errors: inline, below field, with `role="alert"` / `aria-live="polite"`
- [ ] Focus order matches visual order (especially in RTL)
- [ ] `prefers-reduced-motion` respected
- [ ] Safety Score gauge: numerical value + target visible as text, not position-only

### Performance
- [ ] Photo thumbnails `loading="lazy"` with aspect-ratio reserved
- [ ] Lists ≥50 items virtualized
- [ ] Skeleton screens for loads >300ms
- [ ] WebP/AVIF for uploaded photos (server-side conversion)

---

All recommendations above were generated by targeted queries against the `ui-ux-pro-max` skill's databases:

| Query | Domain | Source CSV |
|-------|--------|------------|
| `"construction safety compliance dashboard mobile data-dense professional"` | `--design-system` | products + styles + colors + typography |
| `"construction safety industrial orange amber"` | `color` | colors.csv → Construction/Architecture |
| `"gauge score progress kpi real-time"` | `chart` | charts.csv → Gauge + Bullet |
| `"loading skeleton empty state data-dense filter"` | `ux` | ux-guidelines.csv |
| `"hebrew multilingual technical dashboard"` | `typography` | typography.csv → Hebrew Modern |
| `"operations B2B safety compliance enterprise"` | `product` | products.csv → B2B Service + Legal Services |
| `"data-dense dashboard kpi card grid enterprise"` | `style` | styles.csv → Data-Dense + Bento + Executive |
| `"touch target accessibility RTL"` | `ux` | ux-guidelines.csv |

All rules cross-referenced with Priority 1-10 Quick Reference (accessibility, touch, performance, style, layout, typography, animation, forms, navigation, charts).

---

## How Part 1-5 specs reference this doc

Every Part spec (Foundation, Backend Core, Backend Advanced, Frontend Core, Frontend Polish) will start with:

> **Design system:** Follows `specs/safety-design-system.md`. Use semantic color tokens (`--color-accent`, `--color-destructive`, status ramp), Heebo typography with `tnum`, 44pt touch targets, 4/8pt spacing scale. See checklist §11 before merge.

No need to re-specify these in every Part spec.
